# forg.to API Documentation
> Build on top of the build-in-public ecosystem.

## Overview
The forg.to API provides read-only access to public data about builders, products, and updates. All responses are JSON.

## Base URL
`https://api.forg.to/v1`

## Key Sections
- [Authentication](https://api.forg.to/docs#authentication): Bearer token required.
- [Products](https://api.forg.to/docs#products): Fetch product details and updates.
- [Users](https://api.forg.to/docs#users): Fetch builder profiles and posts.
- [Rate Limits](https://api.forg.to/docs#rate-limits): 100 requests per minute.

## Entities
- **Builder**: A user on forg.to who builds in public.
- **Product**: A project or startup tracked on forg.to.
- **Update**: A milestone or post shared by a builder.
